title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: System transitions to PasswordSent state after submitting the password.

title: EP - Invalid password length (empty)
test_steps:
Leave password field empty
Trigger client-side validation (e.g., click submit)
expected_result: Client validation fails; password is not sent to the server (validation error may be shown).

title: EP - Valid password length (>=1)
test_steps:
Enter a password string with length exactly 1 (e.g., 'a')
Trigger client-side validation (e.g., click submit)
expected_result: Client validation passes; password is sent to the server.

title: DT - Password length <1: do not send
test_steps:
Submit with empty password
Verify no server request sent

title: DT - Password length >=1: send to server
test_steps:
Input a valid password of length 1
Submit

title: BVA - Password length above minimum boundary (2)
test_steps:
Enter a password with 2 characters ('ab')
Submit
expected_result: Password accepted and sent to server.

title: BVA - Password length below minimum boundary (0)
test_steps:
Submit with empty password field
Observe validation result
expected_result: Client validation detects length 0; password not sent.

title: BVA - Password length at minimum boundary (1)
test_steps:
Enter a password with exactly 1 character ('a')
Trigger submit
expected_result: Password accepted and sent to server.
